skip to main content

Official website of the State of North Carolina

Here's how you know

Official websites use .gov
A .gov website belongs to an official government organization in the United States.

Secure .gov websites use HTTPS
A lock ( ) or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites.

Secretary of State
Elaine F. Marshall

North Carolina Secretary of State's Office

Turn-Around Times (Online is always faster)
Entity Creation – 10-15 business days
Authentications – 15-20 business days
Misleading Mailing Alert
Vendors are aggressively pushing “priority,” “early” Annual Report filing, charging fees on top of the filing fees required by statute. Save time and money – file online after the first of the year by clicking on the yellow button titled “File your Business Annual Report.”
Rural RISE NC
Our Rural RISE NC initiative connects you with mentors, business counselors, funding sources, and more—within your community and beyond. And even better, many of these resources are free.
❮ ❯

  • File Your Business Annual Report
  • Reinstate Your Dissolved Business
  • Renew Your Notary Commission
  • Find Business Resources

Alerts
  • The Secretary of State in North Carolina does not have authority over elections or voter registration. If you have questions about elections or voting, please contact the North Carolina State Board of Elections at ncsbe.gov.  Elections
  • This site uses cookies.  Secretary of State Disclaimer & Privacy
  • To return to Alerts click on Alerts at the top right of the site.  
  • Vendors are aggressively pushing “priority,” “early” Annual Report filing, charging fees on top of the filing fees required by statute. Save time and money – file online after the first of the year by clicking on the yellow button titled “File your Business Annual Report.”
